blocks.title: DeterministicFollowUps
rows: Verify that the audit trail captures changes made by users, including timestamps and user identifiers.

rawData.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

resultPayload.note: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to confirm the existence of an audit trail that tracks who changed what and when. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or reads that demonstrate the presence of such an audit trail. The linked use case explicitly states the need for this functionality, but without concrete evidence showing that this requirement was tested or validated, it results in a gap.
gaps: No evidence of an audit trail capturing changes made by users.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add audit trail validation checks
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the audit trail captures changes made by users, including timestamps and user identifiers.
